task: Map existing backend/frontend payment seams
acceptance_criteria: Relevant recharge wallet setting routes and UI seams inspected
validation_command: rg -n \Recharge|PaymentChannel|wallet|systemSettings\" crates apps/hook_backend apps/hook_frontend"

task: Add payment crate abstractions and epay tests
acceptance_criteria: Payment crate exposes provider interfaces and epay signing/notify tests
validation_command: cargo test -p payment

task: Implement Rust types storage migrations and recharge services
acceptance_criteria: Backend compiles and recharge/storage tests pass
validation_command: cargo test -p payment && cargo test -p recharge && cargo test -p storage

task: Wire backend routes startup settings and auth whitelist
acceptance_criteria: Epay provider registered and notify route is public
validation_command: cargo check -p backend

task: Implement frontend admin config and recharge launch
acceptance_criteria: Frontend type/lint/build accepts payment flow
validation_command: pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm build:frontend

task: Run final validation and summarize
acceptance_criteria: Repository validation commands run or failures captured
validation_command: just test && pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm build:frontend
notes: just test fails in unrelated apps/hook_backend/src/llm_proxy/formats.rs::streaming_requests_do_not_route_to_force_non_stream_formats; related payment/recharge/storage/setting/frontend checks pass

task: Add recharge captcha system setting
acceptance_criteria: System settings types storage and baseline seed expose recharge captcha switch
validation_command: timeout 60 cargo test -p types && timeout 60 cargo test -p setting

task: Verify recharge captcha during order creation
acceptance_criteria: Create recharge order consumes captcha token when recharge captcha is enabled
validation_command: timeout 60 cargo test -p captcha && timeout 60 cargo test -p recharge

task: Add frontend recharge captcha controls
acceptance_criteria: Admin recharge settings has captcha switch and wallet recharge submits captcha token
validation_command: pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm build:frontend

task: Run captcha validation and update notes
acceptance_criteria: Relevant validation commands run and progress log captures results
validation_command: cargo fmt --all && timeout 60 cargo check -p backend

task: Hide wallet recharge entry when system recharge is disabled
acceptance_criteria: Wallet center recharge button/dialog are gated by backend recharge_enabled
validation_command: pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm build:frontend

task: Require ready payment channel before enabling recharge
acceptance_criteria: System settings update rejects recharge_enabled=true unless an enabled saved payment channel exists
validation_command: timeout 60 cargo test -p setting && timeout 60 cargo check -p backend

task: Add frontend public base URL guard for enabling payment channels
acceptance_criteria: Payment channel save validates saved public_base_url and shows backend-seeded i18n messages before PATCH
validation_command: pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm build:frontend && timeout 60 cargo check -p backend

task: Localize wallet recharge CAPTCHA labels
acceptance_criteria: Wallet recharge modal passes admin CAPTCHA labels to cap widget and admin i18n seed contains captcha labels
validation_command: pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm build:frontend && timeout 60 cargo check -p backend

task: Open payment in blank window and poll user order status
acceptance_criteria: Wallet payment opens a new blank window before creating the order and refreshes wallet/orders while pending
validation_command: pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm build:frontend

task: Poll pending recharge orders from scheduler
acceptance_criteria: Scheduled recharge_payment_poll task queries unexpired pending orders through provider query APIs and settles paid orders
validation_command: timeout 60 cargo test -p payment && timeout 60 cargo test -p recharge && timeout 60 cargo check -p backend

task: Add frontend ready-channel guard before enabling recharge
acceptance_criteria: System settings save blocks recharge_enabled=true unless frontend has at least one enabled payment channel with saved secret
validation_command: pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm build:frontend && timeout 60 cargo check -p backend

task: Add frontend guards for remaining system settings prerequisites
acceptance_criteria: System settings save validates backend-known prerequisites and field constraints with admin i18n before PATCH
validation_command: pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm build:frontend && timeout 60 cargo check -p backend

task: Fix wallet payment popup navigation
acceptance_criteria: Wallet recharge opens a writable payment window and submits the provider form without staying on about:blank
validation_command: pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm build:frontend

task: Unify payment channel config under system settings save
acceptance_criteria: Payment channel config has no per-channel save button and top-level settings save persists changed channels safely
validation_command: pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm build:frontend && git diff --check

task: Settle epay return and tighten wallet payment UX
acceptance_criteria: Epay browser return can settle verified paid orders, wallet modal warns about new-tab payment, and polling only runs while recharge modal is open
validation_command: pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm build:frontend && timeout 60 cargo test -p recharge && timeout 60 cargo check -p backend

task: Accept trailing slash payment callbacks
acceptance_criteria: Registered payment callback routes and dynamic auth whitelist accept provider return/notify URLs with or without trailing slash
validation_command: timeout 60 cargo test -p recharge trailing_slash_payment_return_route_redirects_to_wallet && timeout 60 cargo test -p backend payment_callback_rule_includes_trailing_slash_variant && timeout 60 cargo check -p backend

task: Move wallet payment guidance into pending modal state
acceptance_criteria: Wallet recharge removes pre-submit warning and shows a post-order pending state with an explicit paid-check action
validation_command: pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm build:frontend && git diff --check

task: Ensure scheduled task list registers payment poll task
acceptance_criteria: Admin scheduled task list synchronizes missing registry tasks so recharge_payment_poll appears without waiting for runtime-only insertion
validation_command: timeout 60 cargo test -p scheduler && timeout 60 cargo check -p backend && git diff --check

task: Add max unpaid recharge order setting and safety audit
acceptance_criteria: System setting defaults to 5 and create order rejects users at pending-order limit with concurrency-safe storage check; payment safety risks are audited
validation_command: timeout 60 cargo test -p recharge && timeout 60 cargo test -p setting && timeout 60 cargo check -p backend && pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm build:frontend && git diff --check

task: Proxy frontend /api requests to backend
acceptance_criteria: Next dev/start rewrites same-origin /api requests to the backend so ngrok on the frontend can carry payment return and notify callbacks
validation_command: pnpm --filter hook_frontend lint && pnpm --filter hook_frontend build && git diff --check

task: Record and display payment callbacks
acceptance_criteria: Real provider notify/return callbacks are persisted and admin recharge callback tab shows records
validation_command: timeout 60 cargo test -p recharge && pnpm lint:frontend && pnpm build:frontend && git diff --check
